hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,re,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); r=re.search(r'\\.(ts|tsx)$',f) if f else None; out=(lambda res: res.stdout+res.stderr)(subprocess.run('npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false',shell=True,capture_output=True,text=True,cwd='C:/VSC_Claude/telbot')) if r else ''; print('TS check: ' + (out.strip()[-600:] if out.strip() else 'OK')) if r else None"
